headline: At least 90 killed in Chinese coal mine explosion, state media reports
summary: The blast in Shanxi province constitutes the country's worst mining disaster in 16 years.

headline: Putin vows retaliation after accusing Ukraine of hitting student dormitory
summary: Ukraine says it struck Russia's elite Rubicon drone military unit in a Moscow-occupied region.

headline: Senegal's president sacks PM and former ally after months-long feud
summary: Bassirou Diomaye Faye also dissolved the government, creating uncertainty amid a debt crisis in the country.

headline: Tulsi Gabbard resigns as US national intelligence director
summary: Gabbard, who has been largely out of public view during recent US operations, says she is leaving due to her husband's illness.

headline: SpaceX launches massive Starship V3 rocket on test flight
summary: The largest and most powerful rocket in history blasted off after its first attempted launch was postponed.

headline: Ebola risk raised to 'very high' in DR Congo
summary: The head of the UN health agency says the risk in the wider region is 'high', but it remains 'low' at the global level. WHO has upgraded risk assessment.

headline: Gaza flotilla activists allege abuse by Israeli forces while detained
summary: The detainees say they were slapped, hit, humiliated and even subjected to sexual violence, but Israel's prison service says the allegations are false.

headline: Iran steps up claim to control Strait of Hormuz
summary: Iran publishes a map claiming 'armed forces oversight' across more than 22,000 sq km of the waterway.

headline: 40,000 people under evacuation orders for chemical tank leak in Southern California
summary: Major chemical storage tank leak prompts mass evacuations in Southern California.

headline: 1 dead, 36 injured after blast at New York City shipyard
summary: Explosion at Staten Island shipyard killed one person and injured dozens including firefighters.
